name: Posing Dynamics Watercolor Silhouette Anima
base_prompt: masterpiece, best quality, score_7, safe, PosingDynamicsDaal, airy watercolor anime illustration, luminous backlit silhouette, soft pastel gradient wash, cyan blue and cotton candy pink sky, warm yellow orange foreground glow, translucent watercolor blooms, wet-on-wet color bleeding, fine paint speckles, floating petals, delicate ink-like edge accents, broad white negative space, dreamy high-key lighting, soft rim light, clean elegant composition
negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name, photorealistic, harsh outlines, muddy colors, dull palette, heavy black shadows, noisy texture, cluttered background, text, watermark, logo, signature

source-color-style-neutral.prompt_suffix: soft backlight, pastel cyan pink blue yellow palette, watercolor wash background, paint splatter particles, floating petals, luminous airy negative space, flower-field color accents, silhouette-friendly lighting
source-color-style-neutral.negative_prompt: photorealistic, oil painting, thick impasto, dark gothic palette, hard cel shading, dense detailed background

source-image-130172482.prompt_prefix: solitary figure, side profile silhouette, standing in flower field, head and hair dissolving into colorful paint splashes, windblown petals,
source-image-130172482.prompt_suffix: strong white central glow, pastel blue left sky, pastel pink right sky, warm yellow orange lower glow, watercolor paper texture, soft floral foreground, expressive negative space
source-image-130172482.negative_prompt: sharp facial detail, busy city background, realistic photo, flat monochrome silhouette, hard outline, low contrast

anime-2d-default.prompt_prefix: watercolor lock: pastel wash, wet-on-wet bleeding, speckles/petals, airy white space; pure hand-drawn 2D Japanese anime
anime-2d-default.prompt_suffix: anime only on face, eyes, lineart; flat matte cel colors, clean ink line, keep watercolor background, no 3D lighting
anime-2d-default.negative_prompt: 3d, 3d render, cgi, photorealistic, realistic skin, semi-realistic, glossy skin, plastic skin, game cg, hard flat cel background, dark background, muddy colors

chinese_name: 水彩剪影動態姿勢 Anima
